description: Botpress is a platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents and chatbots. It provides hosted tooling for agent development, web chat embedding, integrations, and cloud-based runtime management.
summary: Botpress exposes a documented Botpress Cloud HTTP API suite (Chat, Admin, Files, Runtime) authenticated with a personal access token, plus the `adk` CLI authenticated by Botpress account login.

packages.runtimeHint: install via the platform scripts in the ADK quickstart
